texto: Lack of interest in mission is not fundamentally caused by an absence of compassion or commitment, nor by lack of information or exhortation. And lack of interest in mission is not remedied by more shocking statistics, more gruesome stories or more emotionally manipulative commands to obedience. It is best remedied by intensifying peoples’ passion for Christ, so that the passions of his heart become the passions that propel our hearts.
explicacao: Citação de Tim A. Dearborn sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Lack of interest in mission is not fundamentally caused by an absence of compassion or commitment…” articula reflexao, mission, interest em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

frase_original: Lack of interest in mission is not fundamentally caused by an absence of compassion or commitment, nor by lack of information or exhortation. And lack of interest in mission is not remedied by more shocking statistics, more gruesome stories or more emotionally manipulative commands to obedience. It is best remedied by intensifying peoples’ passion for Christ, so that the passions of his heart become the passions that propel our hearts.

texto: God desires that we be like living signs of the kingdom, to provide visual aids of what life will look like one day when the kingdom is here fully. We will not bring the Kingdom or build the kingdom, but our privilege is to live out previews of “coming attractions,” revealing what this Kingdom will look like.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Tim A. Dearborn: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “God desires that we be like living signs of the kingdom, to provide visual aids of what life will…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que vida, mission, reflexao pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
